overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed open-world game showing a character in a long coat and hat walking through a misty forest environment. The character discovers a dead bear carcass along a dirt path and continues walking through the foggy terrain with a scenic valley view.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered pine trees

events.description: dead bear carcass comes into view on the path ahead
character slows slightly while passing the bear carcass

agents.ego_description: walking through tall grass approaching a dead bear lying on the dirt path

entered.detail: tall evergreen tree with thick trunk and needle foliage
large gray rock formation rising above the terrain
steep slope covered in tall green grass and wildflowers
large deceased bear lying on its side on the path
scattered red poppy-like flowers in the grass

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a misty grassy hillside with scattered pine trees and rocky outcrops. Red wildflowers dot the landscape. As the character approaches a dirt path, a large dead bear carcass becomes visible lying on the ground, which the character passes by closely.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding forest trail through dense woodland

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt path through the misty forest

entered.detail: narrow winding trail of packed earth and scattered stones
tall white-barked trees with sparse green foliage
large boulders and rocky outcrops alongside the path

segments.scene_description: The character continues along a narrow dirt forest path surrounded by dense vegetation and tall trees. The environment is enclosed by forest canopy with mist filtering through the trees. The path winds between rocky outcrops and birch trees as the character maintains a steady walking pace.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail overlooking misty valley and lake

events.description: camera orbits around the character showing a 360 view of the surroundings
path opens to reveal expansive view of misty valley and lake below

agents.ego_description: walking along the path while surveying the scenic valley overlook

entered.detail: wide valley with misty lake visible through the fog in the distance
fog-shrouded mountains forming the horizon line
leafless dead tree trunk beside the path

segments.scene_description: The camera orbits around the character before continuing along a path that opens to a dramatic overlook. A misty valley with a lake becomes visible in the distance, surrounded by fog-shrouded mountains. The character walks along the edge of the overlook with the scenic view visible to the right, passing a dead tree trunk as the terrain opens up.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a misty woodland that gradually opens into a sweeping mountain vista. It begins on a grassy hillside dotted with red wildflowers and pine trees, where the camera tracks the character as they pass closely by a large dead bear carcass on a dirt path. As the character moves forward, the landscape closes in, shifting into a dense forest where mist filters through a canopy of tall birch trees and rocky outcrops. The camera then orbits the character before the narrow path expands into a dramatic overlook, revealing a distant lake and fog-shrouded mountains. Finally, the character walks along the edge of this scenic cliff, passing a dead tree trunk as the terrain opens fully to the valley below.
